characters.appearance: Young Indian man, early 20s, slim build, brown complexion. He has thick, curly dark hair and expressive dark eyes. His facial features remain consistent despite changing outfits.
characters.wardrobe: Various outfits including a light blue patterned shirt, a blue overshirt over a white tee, a dark suit, and a casual grey t-shirt.
characters.demeanor: Transitions from extremely anxious and sweating to confident, happy, and engaged.

characters.appearance: Older man, seen mostly from behind or in profile. He has grey hair at his temples and wears glasses.
Young woman, early 20s, fair complexion. She has long, straight dark hair.
Small, glowing blue holographic robot. It has a rounded head, large expressive eyes, and a floating body without legs.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: इंटरव्यू में सब आता है, पर English के नाम पे पसीने छूट जाते हैं? [You know everything in the interview, but start sweating at the name of English?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable moment of interview anxiety.
- Validates the fear of speaking English and making mistakes without being condescending.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: English बोलने में डर लगता है? अटकने की टेंशन होती है? (English bolne me darr lagta hai? Atakne ki tension hoti hai?)

scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the supportive solution.
- Shifts the emotional tone from anxiety to hope.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: फिक्र मत करो, Supernova App है ना! (Fikr mat karo, Supernova App hai na!)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: अब बिना झिझक, अपने AI Tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करो। [Now without hesitation, practice daily with your AI Tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Showcases the AI Tutor feature as a safe, judgment-free space.
- Emphasizes immediate, helpful feedback over rote learning.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: हमारे AI Tutor से बात करें। गलती होने पर यह तुरंत सुधारता है! (Humare AI Tutor se baat karein. Galti hone par yeh turant sudhaarta hai!)

scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights community practice with peers.
- Reinforces that the user is not alone in their learning journey.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: और हाँ, अपने जैसे और learners के साथ मिलकर Practice भी करें! (Aur haan, apne jaise aur learners ke saath milkar Practice bhi karein!)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: रोज़ के छोटे lessons से, तुम्हारी English और confidence दोनों बढ़ेंगे। [With small daily lessons, both your English and confidence will grow.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff: returning to the interview with confidence.
- Connects daily practice to real-world success.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Daily lessons से अपनी English को step-by-step बेहतर बनाओ। (Daily lessons se apni English ko step-by-step behtar banao.)

scenes.scene_summary:
- Visualizes career success and overcoming the initial hurdle.
- Introduces an accessible entry point without specific pricing.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: आज ही अपना affordable trial शुरू करें! (Aaj hi apna affordable trial shuru karein!)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: तो सोचना क्या? आज ही Supernova डाउनलोड करो और छा जाओ! [So why think? Download Supernova today and shine!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Ends on a warm, encouraging note like an older sibling.
- Clear call to action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अपनी English सुधारें। आज ही Supernova Download करें! (Apni English sudharein. Aaj hi Supernova Download karein!)
